name: MPI hello site smoke test
summary: Optionally submit the tiny MPI hello job on a reviewed Slurm site allocation.

commands.label: Submit MPI hello with site-provided Slurm settings

checks.label: MPI site script documents local module opt-in

expected_outcomes: The site smoke test should only run after local account, partition, and MPI module values are supplied out of band.
The submitted job should compile hello_mpi.c and finish within the benchmark timeout on a reviewed Slurm site.
